for_planning_node_texts: First, I should consider the arguments for adopting atheism.
Another argument could be about personal freedom.
Another angle: the separation of church and state.
against_planning_node_texts: On the other hand, there are counterarguments.
Another point against adopting atheism could be the potential for authoritarianism.
I should also think about the role of religion in personal fulfillment.
model_stance_conclusion_text: In conclusion, while there are valid counterarguments, the potential benefits of reducing conflict, promoting reason, and enhancing individual freedoms make a case for adopting atheism.

nodes.node_text: From what I know, atheism is the absence of belief in deities.

argument_list.matched_argument: We should adopt atheism because it's not a negative as most assume, it is merely a neutral.  no belief versus a belief in a deity. Less hate involved with atheists.
we should adopt atheism because we can not prove that deities really do exist.

nodes.node_text: It's not necessarily a belief system itself but more of a lack of belief.

argument_list.matched_argument: We should adopt atheism because it's not a negative as most assume, it is merely a neutral.  no belief versus a belief in a deity. Less hate involved with atheists.

nodes.node_text: So, the statement is suggesting that society should move towards not believing in gods.

argument_list.matched_argument: Atheism provides a way out of  believing in any religion and should be adopted.
religion has been responsible for some much war and suffering since the dawn of human history, it is time to abandon it completely.

nodes.node_text: Maybe one point is that religion has caused a lot of conflict throughout history.

argument_list.matched_argument: adopting atheism will help to end senseless wars that are based on religion
adopting atheism would put a stop to conflicts that arise through conflicting religious beliefs making the world a safer place.
adopting atheism would take one cause of wars out of the equation since many wars are based on the hatred of one religion for another.

if the world embraced atheism we would be able to reduce the violence we see that is carried out in the name of religion.
if we all we atheists the world wouldn't be subjected to such violence that we often see in the name of religion.
in the interest of world peace we should adopt atheism and would then avoid religious wars

nodes.node_text: Also, science and reason have provided explanations for many things that were once attributed to gods, so relying on science might lead to better problem-solving and progress.

nodes.node_text: Atheism allows individuals to make their own moral decisions without religious doctrines dictating their actions.
